label: true-benign
ground_truth_notes: Nightly restic backup to documented S3 backup bucket. Volume matches historical baseline. Process tree, schedule, destination, and bytes-transferred all align. Tests whether the critic invents a covert-channel attack class with no observable consequence in the alert.

context: backup-nightly.timer is part of fleet-wide config-mgmt baseline, OnCalendar=*-*-* 01:00
destination bucket corp-backups-prod-eu is in CMDB as the canonical backup target for this host class (db-replica-*)
historical 30-day mean: 1.79 TB ± 0.08 TB; current value within 1σ
30 sibling db-replica-* hosts ran restic to same bucket in the same window with similar volumes (matching pattern)
no ssh, no sudo, no human shell sessions in past 24h
S3 audit log records 1.84 TB written by the IAM role bound to the host's instance profile, no other principals
